description:
**Milestone:** Pen Renderer — Visual Canvas

Add renderers for remaining core node types. PenTextRenderer: font family/size/weight, color, alignment, line height, letter spacing, rich text segments (TextStyle[]). PenIconRenderer: map icon_font nodes to Lucide React components dynamically (iconFontFamily: lucide → dynamic import from lucide-react). PenRefRenderer: resolve ref nodes to their source component via resolveRef(), render with property overrides from descendants map. PenRectangleRenderer and PenEllipseRenderer for basic shapes.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-text-renderer.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-icon-renderer.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-ref-renderer.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-shape-renderer.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-node-renderer.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Text nodes render with correct font properties
- [ ] Rich text (TextStyle[]) renders inline segments with varying styles
- [ ] Lucide icons render by name lookup (iconFontName → Lucide component)
- [ ] Ref nodes resolve to source component and render with overrides
- [ ] Descendant overrides apply to nested children of ref instances
- [ ] Rectangle and ellipse shapes render with fill and stroke
- [ ] shadcn-kit.pen Sidebar component renders with text, icons, and nested refs

**Complexity:** large
title: Text, Icon & Ref Renderer
